mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bid ( title, procurement_request_id, budget, deadline, description, notification_methods, email_subject, email_body, status, create_time, create_user_id, create_user_name, update_time, update_user_id, update_user_name ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{procurementRequestId}, #{budget}, #{deadline}, #{description}, #{notificationMethods}, #{emailSubject}, #{emailBody}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createUserId}, #{createUserName}, NOW(), #{updateUserId}, #{updateUserName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bid SET title = #{title}, procurement_request_id = #{procurementRequestId}, budget = #{budget}, deadline = #{deadline}, description = #{description}, notification_methods = #{notificationMethods}, email_subject = #{emailSubject}, email_body = #{emailBody}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, update_user_name = #{updateUserName} WHERE bid_id = #{bidId}
mapper.select: SELECT bs.*, s.supplier_name as supplierName, s.email as supplierEmail FROM bid_supplier bs LEFT JOIN supplier s ON bs.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE bs.bid_id = #{bidId}

SELECT b.*, pr.title as procurementRequestName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid_supplier bs WHERE bs.bid_id = b.bid_id) as supplierCount, ep.project_code as evaluation_code FROM bid b LEFT JOIN procurement_request pr ON b.procurement_request_id = pr.procurement_request_id LEFT JOIN evaluation_project ep ON b.bid_id = ep.bid_id
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.status = #{status}
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
